tasks.label: android-wait-for-emulator-boot
args: ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 wait-for-device && until [ "$(${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r')" = "1" ]; do sleep 2; done && until ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell cmd package list packages >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done

tasks.label: run-android-emulator
args: if ! ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb devices | grep -q '^emulator-5554\s'; then ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -avd Medium_Phone_API_36.1 -netdelay none -netspeed full -no-snapshot-load -no-snapshot-save >/tmp/charthub-emulator.log 2>&1 & fi; ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 wait-for-device; until [ "$(${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r')" = "1" ]; do sleep 2; done; until ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell cmd package list packages >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done; dotnet build ${workspaceFolder}/ChartHub/ChartHub.csproj -t:Install -p:EnableAndroid=true -f net10.0-android -p:Device=emulator-5554 -p:RuntimeIdentifier=android-x64 -p:EmbedAssembliesIntoApk=true -p:AndroidSdkDirectory=${HOME}/Android/Sdk

tasks.label: android-logcat-crash
args: ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 logcat -c; ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 shell monkey -p com.calahilstudios.charthub -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; sleep 4; ${HOME}/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -s emulator-5554 logcat -d | rg -n 'FATAL EXCEPTION|AndroidRuntime|Unhandled Exception|com\.calahilstudios\.charthub' -i | tail -200
